hero.headline:
Your website.
Done right.
hero.subheadline: We build fast. We reply same day. What we promise, we deliver. No tech jargon.

services.title: What you get
services.subtitle: Fast delivery. Full communication. Zero stress.

webDev.title: Websites & Apps
webDev.description: Ready in 2-4 weeks. Works from day one. No fixes needed.

automation.title: Automation
automation.description: What you did manually now happens automatically. You'll see the difference immediately.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce
ecommerce.description: Payments, inventory, orders — everything works. You just pack and ship.

seo.title: SEO
seo.description: Fast site that Google understands. The rest is content.

consulting.title: Consulting
consulting.description: We tell you what you need, not what you want to hear. Saves money.

support.title: Support
support.description: Have a problem? We reply within an hour. Fixed the same day.

nanobid.title: NanoBid
nanobid.description: Real-time auction platform with live bidding, instant notifications, and secure payments.

kurs8klasisty.title: Kurs8Klasisty
kurs8klasisty.description: Polish e-learning platform preparing 8th graders for English exams with online courses and practical guides. Materials aligned with official CKE requirements for maximum exam scores.

careerflex.title: CareerFlex.app
careerflex.description: AI job analyzer matching CVs to job descriptions with instant compatibility scores and tailored CV generation. Chrome extension works on LinkedIn, Indeed and major job platforms with unlimited free analysis.

wiredfor.title: WiredFor.co
wiredfor.description: Business growth platform using Human Design principles to show how you naturally attract clients and make decisions. Personalized scaling strategy based on your unique operational style and energy type.

entee.title: Entee.ai
entee.description: Voice reporting app for field teams to submit audio updates from construction and service job sites. Mobile-first platform replacing paperwork with instant voice reports and team coordination.

airea.title: AIREA
airea.description: AI-powered real estate platform with intelligent property matching and market insights.

yourproject.title: Your Project
yourproject.description: Ready to build something great? Let's discuss your next big idea.

testimonials.title: What clients say
testimonials.subtitle: No fluff.
testimonials.fast: Lightning fast delivery and code that works. Exactly what I needed.
testimonials.precise: Every detail polished. No weird libraries or plugins.
testimonials.understand: They understand business, not just code. That's rare in this industry.
testimonials.roi: Three months in and we're seeing 40% more conversions. The site paid for itself.
testimonials.hosting: Was paying 400 PLN monthly for shared hosting that kept crashing. They moved us to Cloudflare - now it's free and faster.
testimonials.honest: Told us we didn't need half the features we asked for. Saved us 15k and the site works better without the bloat.
testimonials.migration: Migrated from WordPress without losing a single customer. No downtime. No broken links. Just worked.

faq.title: Questions & Answers
faq.subtitle: Straight answers. No fluff.
faq.q1: How much does a website cost?
faq.a2:
Simple website: from 8000 PLN.

Shop or app: from 25000 PLN.

Tell us what you need — we'll quote in 24h.
faq.a3:
Simple website: 2-4 weeks.

Shop or app: 6-12 weeks.

Depends on how fast you reply.
faq.a4: Site will be fast and Google-friendly. That's half the battle. Content is the other half — we'll help you write it.
faq.a5: You get all the code and documentation. You own it. If you want, we stay for support.
faq.a1: Yes. All prices are netto + VAT. You can deduct the tax.

contact.title:
Write to us.
We'll reply in 24h.
contact.subtitle: No BS. No empty promises. We tell it like it is.
